STRATUM_01.jurisdictional_scope: Inherent individual sovereignty that predates statutory creation.

STRATUM_02.jurisdictional_scope: Washington State Constitution - Establishes the three branches of state government, including judicial limits.
STRATUM_02.legal_weight_baseline: Supreme state authority bounding all courts

STRATUM_03.jurisdictional_scope: Revised Code of Washington (RCW) Title 2 - Courts of Record; Mandated Superior Court organization and Clerk duties.
STRATUM_03.validation_phase: Phase C: System Integrity & Rule Compliance

STRATUM_04.jurisdictional_scope: Washington State Local General Rule 31 (LGR 31) - Governs public access to digital court records via portals.
STRATUM_04.legal_weight_baseline: Strictly limited to data handling; cannot create new laws
STRATUM_04.validation_phase: Phase C: System Integrity & Rule Compliance
